title: Mycuprus-aeronautics
description: Modded server based on mods such as: create:aeronautics and some other create mod addons.
body:
# Whitelist is currently enabled. To join MyCuprus — Aeronautics, you'll first need to join our Discord server and apply for access there.

MyCuprus — Aeronautics is a modded Minecraft multiplayer server focused on aviation, engineering, and creativity. Build aircraft, design airports, create transport systems, and collaborate on large-scale projects in a friendly, community-driven world.

Join the Discord server to get whitelisted and start playing with us!
